document_api_meta.title: Get Shoppable Video Precheck Result
document_api_meta.env_desc: Use this API to get video pre-check result

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The creator access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 1. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a362dccb8030ea6f98c) to get creator access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^^id
response_param.desc: The id of the video pre-check task.

response_param.name: ^^^status
response_param.desc:
SUCCESS: The precheck task passed violation checks
FAIL: The precheck task has failed due to violations. Check the 'issues' field for details.
PROCESSING: The precheck violation task is still in progress

response_param.name: ^^^issues
response_param.desc: A list of policy violation details returned when violation check fails

response_param.name: ^^^^suggestions
response_param.example: Your video may include unoriginal content. Creating original content is essential for standing out from the crowd.
response_param.desc: Detailed guidance to resolve the detected violation.

response_param.name: ^^^status
response_param.desc:
SUCCESS: The precheck task passed all good quality checks
FAIL: The precheck task failed good quality checks. Check the 'issues' field for details.
PROCESSING: The good qualtify check is still in progress

response_param.name: ^^^issues
response_param.desc: A list of quality issues and improvement suggestions when the good quality check fails.

response_param.name: ^^^^suggestions
response_param.example: You can try to showcase the product from multiple perspectives.
response_param.desc: Recommended improvements based on the quality finding.

error_code_list.msg: Internal error. Please try again. If the issue persists after multiple attempts, please contact platform support.

document_api_meta.response_body: {"code":0,"data":{"precheck_task":{"id":"7493990579714164574","violation_check_result":{"status":"FAIL","issues":[{"risk":"Pirated Content","suggestions":"Your video may include unoriginal content. Creating original content is essential for standing out from the crowd."}]},"good_quality_check_result":{"status":"FAIL","issues":[{"code":"LOW_CONTENT_PROMOTIO","suggestions":"You can try to showcase the product from multiple perspectives."}]}}},"message":"Success","request_id":"202203070749000101890810281E8C70B7"}

sample_code.label: Go
Node.js
Java

scope_list.package_description: You will be able to post shoppable content to the creator's TikTok account. If this content violates any TikTok Shop terms or policies, TikTok Shop may take enforcement action against the creator's account or the content.
scope_list.auth_info: The developer will be able to post shoppable content to your TikTok account. If this content violates any TikTok Shop terms or policies, TikTok Shop may take enforcement action against your account or the content.
